name: github_issues
description: GitHub Issues management tool for searching, creating, and updating issues via the GitHub REST API. Integrates with bug triage, code review, and task prioritization agents.

environment_variables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: GitHub personal access token for API authentication

example_usage:
```python
from github_issues import search_issues, get_issue, create_issue

# Search for open bugs
issues = search_issues(
    repo="facebook/react",
    query="is:open label:bug",
    max_results=10
)

# Get specific issue
issue = get_issue("facebook/react", 12345)
print(f"Title: {issue.title}")

# Create new issue
new_issue = create_issue(
    repo="myorg/myrepo",
    title="Bug: Login fails",
    body="Description...",
    labels=["bug", "priority-high"]
)
```
post_add_instructions: Set GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable with your personal access token. Without a token, the tool is limited to 60 requests/hour. With authentication, you get 5000 requests/hour.
